name: @ai-pandit/api
description: AI Pandit BTR Engine - Vedic Astrology Birth Time Rectification

scripts.lint:strict:phase1: eslint src/server.ts src/config/**/*.ts src/utils/**/*.ts src/routes/*.ts src/middleware/*.ts --rule '@typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars:[1,{"argsIgnorePattern":"^_","varsIgnorePattern":"^_"}]' --rule 'prefer-const:1' --max-warnings 0
scripts.phase3:verify: vitest run src/lib/__tests__/queue-manager.test.ts src/routes/__tests__/progress.test.ts src/lib/__tests__/sse-throughput.test.ts src/lib/__tests__/frontend_memory_limit.test.ts src/routes/__tests__/queue.test.ts src/routes/__tests__/calculate.test.ts
scripts.test:full:deterministic: npm run test && npm run test:ephemeris:gold:strict && vitest run src/routes/__tests__/health.test.ts src/lib/jobs/__tests__/job-service.validation-idempotency.test.ts src/lib/__tests__/session-events.test.ts src/lib/__tests__/frontend_memory_limit.test.ts src/lib/__tests__/sse-throughput.test.ts
scripts.phase6:release-gate: npm run env:preflight:safe && npm run phase3:verify && npm run test:full:deterministic && npm run phase5:verify && npm run smoke:duplicate-flow:deterministic
scripts.test:ephemeris:high-precision: RUN_HIGH_PRECISION_EPHEMERIS_TESTS=true SKIP_EPHEMERIS_INIT=false EPHEMERIS_PROVIDER=skyfield EPHEMERIS_ALLOW_ALGORITHMIC_FALLBACK=false NEON_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:5432/postgres DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:5432/postgres AI_API_KEY=test-key CLERK_SECRET_KEY=sk_test_123 ENCRYPTION_SECRET=test-secret-at-least-32-chars-long-12345 vitest run src/lib/__tests__/ground-truth.test.ts
scripts.test:ephemeris:gold:strict: EPHEMERIS_GOLD_ENFORCE_TRUSTED=true SKIP_EPHEMERIS_INIT=false EPHEMERIS_PROVIDER=skyfield EPHEMERIS_ALLOW_ALGORITHMIC_FALLBACK=false NEON_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:5432/postgres DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:5432/postgres AI_API_KEY=test-key CLERK_SECRET_KEY=sk_test_123 ENCRYPTION_SECRET=test-secret-at-least-32-chars-long-12345 tsx src/scripts/validate-ephemeris-gold-dataset.ts
scripts.ephemeris:parity:quick: npm run ephemeris:compare && npm run test:ephemeris:high-precision && npm run test:ephemeris:gold && RUN_HIGH_PRECISION_EPHEMERIS_TESTS=true SKIP_EPHEMERIS_INIT=false EPHEMERIS_PROVIDER=skyfield EPHEMERIS_ALLOW_ALGORITHMIC_FALLBACK=false NEON_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:5432/postgres DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:5432/postgres AI_API_KEY=test-key CLERK_SECRET_KEY=sk_test_123 ENCRYPTION_SECRET=test-secret-at-least-32-chars-long-12345 vitest run src/lib/ephemeris/__tests__/skyfield-swiss-parity.test.ts
scripts.verify:stack:deployed: npm run verify:worker-health && npm run smoke:duplicate-flow
